pages.title: Skeleton
pages.text: $(rev)Corpus entry:$(warn) fragments torn from Skeleton donors keep their cultural locomotion hints even when stitched elsewhere.

pages.title: Recorded anatomy
pages.text: Torso, Arms, Legs — skull belongs to $(italic)other$(warn) mods; use a donor head if you want a faced minion.

pages.title: Stitcher's marginalia
pages.text: $(rev)Arms:$(warn) grant an extra arrow after melee swings — volley harassers adore these grafts.
